ObjectName.value: Christopher Morcom’s photograph of the Big Schoolroom, Sherborne School, c.1929

Categories.value: Sherborne School|Author died more than 70 years ago public domain images|Pipe organs in Dorset|CC-PD-Mark|PD-old missing SDC copyright status|Christopher Morcom

ImageDescription.value: Christopher Morcom’s photograph of the Big Schoolroom, Sherborne School, c.1929. It was in this room on 6 February 1930 that Christopher Morcom and Alan Turing attended a concert by the Salisbury Singers. (Sherborne School Archives)

Artist.value: These are all taken by Christopher Morcom who died in 1930; therefore according to UK law it is in the public domain, since that covers anyone who died before 1956 as of 2026 (70 years).
